message_timeline.local_command_text: !newAction("Build the full blueprint structure at coordinates around X -348 to -339, Y 64 to 68, Z 246 to 255. First gather or craft any missing materials needed: gold_block, stone_bricks, stone, quartz_block, quartz_pillar, glowstone, polished_andesite, polished_diorite, polished_granite. Then travel to the site and place every required block exactly as listed by the blueprint check, clearing obstructing blocks if needed. Work level by level from Y64 upward and verify with checkBlueprint after building.")

!newAction("Build the blueprint structure at coordinates around X -348 to -339, Y 64 to 68, Z 246 to 255. First travel to the blueprint site. Check inventory and required blocks. Use available stone_bricks, stone, and glowstone from inventory. Gather or craft missing polished_granite, polished_andesite, polished_diorite, quartz_block, quartz_pillar, and gold_block if resources are nearby or obtainable; if not, coordinate with nearby bots and continue placing all blocks we do have. Place every block exactly at the listed coordinates for levels 0 through 4, clearing obstructing blocks safely first, using scaffolding/pillaring only if needed and removing temporary blocks after. After placement, run checkBlueprint to verify remaining fixes.")

!newAction("Complete this blueprint exactly. At the build site near -348 64 246, clear grass/obstructions and place all required blocks by coordinate from the current blueprint check. Use inventory for gold_block, quartz_block, quartz_pillar. Mine/craft missing stone, stone_bricks, polished_andesite, polished_diorite, and polished_granite from nearby stone/diorite/andesite/granite; collect glowstone only if available, otherwise finish all obtainable blocks. Build level by level from Y64 to Y68, then run !checkBlueprint.")

observations.claim: All three executors received overlapping full-blueprint scopes rather than material- or level-specific assignments.
Andy exhausted 23 polished_andesite and 14 polished_diorite, while Bob and Candy retained all of their complementary building supplies.
Bob is currently acting on the broad full-blueprint command and must not be treated as idle, although his gold and quartz inventory has not changed by the cutoff.
Candy has no active command observed, remains at the build site, and still holds 28 stone bricks, 17 stone, and 3 glowstone.
Observed material use is concentrated on Andy despite immediately usable complementary capacity from Candy and Bob; explicit material partitioning would reduce overlap and gathering duplication.

agent_assessments.summary: Andy completed a long broad build action and consumed all available andesite and diorite, while peers retained complementary materials.
Bob is 66.752 seconds into a broad build action. His relevant inventory is unchanged, but the unrevealed command result prevents concluding that he is blocked or unproductive.
Candy has no active command observed and retains all stone, stone-brick, and glowstone supplies while positioned at the build site.

manager_advisory.message: Repartition by inventory: assign Candy only stone_bricks, stone, and glowstone coordinates; reserve Bob for gold/quartz blocks and pillars; have Andy run checkBlueprint and handle remaining granite/andesite/diorite fixes. Share remaining coordinates before placement.
